response.original_title: The Little Prince: The Planet of the Bubble Gob
response.overview: The universe is in danger. Stars are being extinguished, one after the other, after the Snake's fateful visit. Accompanied by his inseparable friend Fox, the Little Prince must solve this problem, and leaves his asteroid and his Rose for a great journey. Traveling from planet to planet, he discovers vast, enchanting worlds…
response.title: The Little Prince: The Planet of the Bubble Gob
